eas_text: A civil authority has issued A NUCLEAR POWER PLANT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Oconee, SC; at 9:00 AM on OCT 9, 2019 Effective until 9:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
a.	THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT AND NOTIFICATION SYSTEM FOR DUKE ENERGY'S OCONEE NUCLEAR STATION. THIS MESSAGE ACCOMPANIES THE TESTING OF THE SIRENS INSTALLED IN THE TEN MILE AREA AROUND THE STATION. THIS TEST, AS WELL AS THE SIRENS, ARE REQUIRED BY FEDERAL REGULATION. 

IF AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY CONDITION EXISTED, THE SIRENS WOULD HAVE ALERTED YOU TO TURN ON A RADIO OR TELEVISION FOR FURTHER INFORMATION. THAT INFORMATION WOULD DESCRIBE ACTIONS THAT YOU SHOULD TAKE, A SHORT DESCRIPTION OF THE EMERGENCY CONDITION, AND WHEN A FOLLOW-UP MESSAGE IS EXPECTED. 
 
THE PURPOSE OF THE SIREN SYSTEM IS TO ALERT PEOPLE IN THE AREA THAT A PROBLEM EXISTS. ACTIVATION OF THE SIREN SYSTEM DOES NOT MEAN EVACUATE. AGAIN, THE SIREN SYSTEM IS AN ALERT TO TURN ON YOUR RADIO OR TELEVISION. 
 
THIS CONCLUDES THIS TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT AND NOTIFICATION SYSTEM FOR THE OCONEE NUCLEAR STATION. THIS WAS ONLY A TEST.
